leagueBriefing: Trabzonspor dominated the headlines on Monday as Paul Onuachu etched his name into the history books, while Alanyaspor and Gençlerbirliği played out a tactical stalemate.

games.headline: Onuachu shatters 14-year record as Trabzonspor cruises past Kayserispor
games.brief: Paul Onuachu was the star of the show at the Rhg Enertürk Enerji Stadyumu, putting on a clinic to help Trabzonspor secure a comfortable away victory. The towering striker struck twice in first-half stoppage time—once with a signature header and once from the penalty spot—to effectively kill the contest before the break. A chaotic own goal early in the second half extended the lead to three before German Onugkha found a late consolation for the hosts. The night belonged entirely to Onuachu, whose double saw him reach the 20-goal milestone and break a long-standing club scoring record.
bullets: Paul Onuachu broke a 14-year Trabzonspor record for goals in a single season, reaching 20 league goals with his first-half brace.
Onuachu’s first goal was a powerful header assisted by Wagner Pina, followed shortly by a penalty after a handball by László Bénes.
Kayserispor goalkeeper Bilal Bayazıt was credited with an unfortunate own goal after an Oleksandr Zubkov shot rattled the post and rebounded off him.
German Onugkha pulled one back for Kayserispor in the 83rd minute following a neat assist from Miguel Cardoso.
The win marks Trabzonspor's second dominant victory over Kayserispor this season, following a 4-0 win earlier in the campaign.
games.context: Onuachu's record-breaking form solidifies his status as the league's most clinical finisher and keeps Trabzonspor firmly in the hunt for European spots.

highlights.title: Kayserispor (1-3) Trabzonspor - Highlights/Özet | Trendyol Süper Lig - 2025/26

games.headline: Ricardo Velho heroics secure gritty point for Gençlerbirliği in Alanya
games.brief: It was a night of 'what could have been' for Alanyaspor as they threw everything but the kitchen sink at Gençlerbirliği, only to be denied by a brick wall named Ricardo Velho. The hosts dominated nearly every statistical category, launching 18 attempts and maintaining 59% possession, but they could not find a way past the visiting keeper. Velho produced seven crucial saves, including a spectacular double-stop in the sixth minute of second-half stoppage time, to ensure his side left with a share of the spoils. While Alanyaspor will be frustrated by the lack of clinical finishing, Gençlerbirliği will celebrate a hard-earned defensive masterclass.
bullets: Gençlerbirliği goalkeeper Ricardo Velho earned Player of the Match honors with 7 saves, including two in the final minute of stoppage time.
Alanyaspor's Steve Mounié nearly opened the scoring in the 5th minute but saw his effort strike the right post.
The hosts were incredibly active on the wings, delivering 42 crosses throughout the match.
Zan Zuzek and Dimitris Goutas combined for 21 clearances to lead a disciplined Gençlerbirliği defensive line.
The draw keeps Alanyaspor in 11th place, just one point ahead of 12th-place Gençlerbirliği.
games.context: Both teams remain deadlocked in the middle of the table, failing to gain ground in the race for a top-half finish.

highlights.title: Alanyaspor (0-0) Gençlerbirliği - Highlights/Özet | Trendyol Süper Lig - 2025/26

games.headline: Early Serdar Dursun penalty lifts Kocaelispor past wasteful Eyüpspor
games.brief: Kocaelispor made an early statement at the Recep Tayyip Erdoğan Stadyumu and then dug in deep to defend it. Serdar Dursun converted a penalty just six minutes into the match, and despite Eyüpspor creating several clear-cut chances to equalize, the visitors held firm. The most notable miss came from Umut Bozok, who found himself one-on-one with the keeper but failed to convert. It was a professional, if unspectacular, performance from Kocaelispor that sees them climb the table while leaving Eyüpspor to rue their missed opportunities in front of their home fans.
bullets: Serdar Dursun scored the only goal of the game from the penalty spot in the 6th minute, marking his 4th goal of the season.
Eyüpspor's Umut Bozok had the best chance to level the score in the 35th minute but was denied by Gökhan Değirmenci.
Kocaelispor goalkeeper Gökhan Değirmenci was vital in maintaining the clean sheet, frustrating the home attack throughout.
The result moves Kocaelispor up to 33 points, while Eyüpspor remains stagnant on 22 points.
The match was a disciplined affair with Kocaelispor successfully absorbing pressure for the final 80 minutes.
games.context: Kocaelispor’s victory pulls them further away from the relegation zone and closer to a comfortable mid-table position.

highlights.title: Eyüpspor (0-1) Kocaelispor - Highlights/Özet | Trendyol Süper Lig - 2025/26
